[15/03/2024, 09:12:05] Ghana Motors Trading: Hello boss, do you have G4KJ engine available?
[15/03/2024, 09:14:22] Me: Hi my friend, thanks for your message. Let me check with our supplier network for G4KJ engine.
[15/03/2024, 09:15:01] Me: Please share vehicle model, year and destination port to Ghana Tema.
[15/03/2024, 09:20:33] Ghana Motors Trading: Hyundai Tucson 2016, need FOB price to Tema Ghana
[15/03/2024, 09:25:10] Me: I will check availability and send quotation FOB Tema. Please confirm quantity.
[15/03/2024, 10:01:44] Ghana Motors Trading: Your price is too high, can you give discount?
[15/03/2024, 10:05:30] Me: Sorry my friend, this is already best price we can offer from verified suppliers.
[15/03/2024, 10:10:00] Ghana Motors Trading: OK please follow up when ready
[20/03/2024, 14:30:00] Ghana Motors Trading: Any update on G4KJ engine shipment to Ghana?
